acceptance_criteria: All listed CSV files attached and matching artifact cell values in actual_outputs.json
CitationMap clearly links each input cell to packet_row.field
FormulaText sheet contains readable formula expressions for main computed columns
resilience_memo.md uploaded in full and recommendations align with CSV-derived outputs
No unresolved parse errors reported by verifier; xlsx_parse_status may remain but CSVs permit full verification
extra_model_fields.estimated_effort: low (mainly packaging/export tasks and memo update)
priority_order: Produce CSV exports of key sheets

extra_model_fields.estimated_effort: low (mainly packaging/export tasks and memo update)
priority_order: Produce CSV exports of key sheets

planned_changes: Export the following workbook sheets to CSV (one file per sheet): Inputs.csv, Calculations.csv, Sensitivity.csv, Validation.csv, FinalDecision.csv. Include header rows and row identifiers that match packet row citations.
Add a CitationMap sheet (and export as CitationMap.csv) that explicitly maps each Input cell to packet_row.field (e.g., Inputs!B2 -> packet_row_1.RPO_req_h).

Add a FormulaText sheet containing the literal formula text for all computed columns used in the decision logic (RPO_gap_h, RPO_status, restore_status mapping, immutable_status, system_label escalation) and export as FormulaText.csv or FormulaText.txt.
Untruncate and re-upload the complete resilience_memo.md; ensure the AD recommendation and all per-system recommended actions are fully spelled out and match actual_outputs.
Add a small worked example table (1-2 rows) in the Calculations sheet showing formula text and evaluated values, and include it in the CSV exports.
If macros or external data connections exist, document them in the memo and provide safe macro-free computed-sheet exports reflecting their outputs.
Optionally regenerate the spreadsheet as ODS or include an explicit ODS export to increase compatibility with graders lacking openpyxl.
Re-run normalization to ensure actual_outputs.json remains consistent with the newly-attached CSV exports and memo; attach normalized actual_outputs if changed.
raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Verification limited by inability to parse XLSX in grader environment and by truncated memo preview; provide parseable exports and complete memo to enable cell-level verification and remove pass_with_reservations.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Baseline deliverables meet the artifact contract and the documented decision logic is consistent with normalized actual_outputs. However verification is limited by inability to parse the spreadsheet binary (openpyxl unavailable) and by a truncated memo preview. Verifier labels outcome as pass_with_reservations. To remove reservations, provide parseable exports and the complete memo text so reviewers can perform cell-level checks and confirm final recommendations.
